resultList.dtldesc: Introducing a stunning 3 BHK villa for sale in Ramapuram, Chennai — a vaastu-approved, east-facing property that promises a perfect blend of comfort and peace.::::::Property Specifications::::::The spacious and well-designed home boasts a cozy carpet area of 1800 sq.ft, cleverly divided over Ground and First Floors (G plus 1 construction). The house is semi-furnished with elegant woodwork already done, promising a ready-to-move-in experience.::::::On the Ground Floor, the arrangement consists of 2 bedrooms, well-ventilated and tidily completed. There are 2 bathrooms — one shared with a bedroom and one common, with both Indian and Western-style toilets, and both bathrooms have geyser points provided for the supply of hot water. The ground floor also includes a large living area, a complete kitchen with a modular configuration, and an internal staircase that conveniently links to the first floor. Contributing to the efficiency, a utility area is also carefully added to the kitchen, perfect for laundry and other storage requirements.::::::The First Floor is made up of 1 big bedroom with an attached Western bathroom, once more provision for a geyser. Added to this, there is a sit-out space that is ideal for relaxing in the evenings or simply to have get-togethers. The interior of the home is a gracious mix of Granite, Marble, and Vitrified flooring to add to elegance as well as strength.::::::Facilities::::::The property includes a covered parking space, which is safe and easy to store vehicles. It also includes 24-hour water supply with both borewell and corporation water connections, making water readily available at all times.::::::Location:::::::The property has a great location with easy access, being near major METRO stations, making travel easy. Prime educational institutes such as SRM College, Amrita Vidyalaya, and PSBB KK Nagar are easily accessible, making them well-suited for families. To cater to their healthcare requirements, hospitals are within 200 meters, while malls, supermarkets, and shopping venues are also not more than 200 meters away. Banks and ATMS can be found nearby. Buses and autos are readily accessible at short notice, with good public transportation access. For those dependent on train transport, the Guindy Railway Station is about 4 km away, with excellent connectivity within the city.::::
